title: SmPlan: ToDo List With Reminder
description: This focus app takes the proven Pomodoro technique and makes it even more practical for modern lifestyles. Instead of just setting a timer, it builds a complete and immersive environment designed entirely for deep work — minimizing distractions, reducing interruptions, and maximizing your concentration throughout the day. Users can create fully customized work and break intervals tailored to their unique schedule, track exactly how many focus sessions they complete each day, and review deeply detailed statistics about their focus habits and personal productivity trends over time. The design philosophy is intentionally minimal and visually calming, specifically chosen to reduce cognitive load so you can direct all of your mental energy entirely on the task at hand. Smart notifications gently let you know when it's time to pause and when it's time to resume, helping you maintain a healthy and sustainable rhythm between productive work and necessary rest. Over time, the app learns your patterns and suggests optimal focus windows based on your historical performance.

title: Todoist: To-Do List & Planner
description: Todoist is the world's number one task manager and to-do list app for organizing your life and work with clarity and ease. Trusted by over 30 million people across the globe, Todoist helps you regain control of your schedule by organizing all of your tasks into smart, color-coded projects with priorities, labels, and filters. Whether you are managing a complex work project, keeping track of household chores, or planning a long-term personal goal, Todoist adapts to your workflow. The app features natural language input that understands phrases like 'every Monday at 9am', turning everyday language into structured reminders and recurring tasks. Collaboration features let you share projects, assign tasks, and comment on work items with teammates and family members alike. Karma points and productivity trends give you a visual overview of how consistent you've been over weeks and months, motivating you to keep your streak alive. Todoist integrates with over 60 tools including Gmail, Google Calendar, Slack, Zapier, and more.

title: Notion – Notes & Docs
description: Notion is the all-in-one connected workspace where you can think, write, plan, and build. It combines the power of notes, wikis, databases, kanban boards, and calendars into a single flexible tool that works for individuals and large teams alike. Whether you're capturing fleeting thoughts, writing long-form documents, managing complex multi-step projects, or even running an entire company's internal operations — Notion gives you the building blocks to do it exactly the way you want. Its block-based editor lets you drag and drop any type of content: text, images, code, embeds, tables, and even fully relational databases. AI-powered writing assistance helps you draft, summarize, translate, and brainstorm directly within your pages. Thousands of community-built templates give you an instant head start for everything from product roadmaps to personal journals. Notion's real-time collaboration features and granular permission controls make it ideal for remote teams who need a single source of truth for all company knowledge.

title: Forest: Focus for Productivity
description: Forest is a uniquely creative and deeply motivating app that helps you stay focused on the things that truly matter in your real life by keeping you off your phone. The concept is beautifully simple: whenever you want to focus, you plant a virtual seed inside the app. While you stay focused and resist the urge to pick up your phone, your seed slowly grows into a beautiful tree. If you leave the app before the timer ends, your tree withers and dies. Over time, your completed focus sessions build up a growing, lush virtual forest that represents all the productive time you've invested in yourself. Forest also partners with a real tree-planting organization, meaning your in-app coins can be spent to plant actual trees in the real world. The app offers detailed productivity reports, session history, whitelist and blacklist features for specific apps, and team planting for group accountability. With over 1 million real trees planted by its users worldwide, Forest makes productivity feel genuinely meaningful.

title: Any.do: To-do List & Calendar
description: Any.do is a beautifully designed, award-winning productivity app that helps millions of busy people stay organized and get significantly more done every single day. It seamlessly combines task management, to-do lists, reminders, notes, and a full-featured calendar all into one elegant, unified place. The app's daily planner feature encourages you to review and organize your tasks each morning with a simple swipe-based flow, turning overwhelming task lists into a clear, focused plan for the day. Any.do's grocery list and shared list features make it perfect for families coordinating household tasks and chores together. Smart suggestions automatically reschedule missed tasks and remind you of items that have been sitting untouched for too long. Its deep integration with Google Calendar, Outlook, WhatsApp, Siri, and Amazon Alexa ensures that Any.do fits naturally into whatever tools you're already using. Available on iPhone, Android, web, Mac, and as a Chrome extension.

title: Microsoft To Do
description: Microsoft To Do is the intelligent task management app from Microsoft that makes it remarkably easy to stay organized, focused, and on top of your day from morning to night. Built on the foundation of the beloved Wunderlist app, Microsoft To Do has grown into a powerful productivity tool trusted by tens of millions of people worldwide. Create daily to-do lists with ease, set smart reminders with time and location triggers, add detailed notes and file attachments to any task, and effortlessly share lists with family members, friends, or coworkers for real-time collaboration. The signature 'My Day' feature helps you intentionally curate a focused list of tasks for today, while AI-powered suggestions surface the most relevant tasks from your other lists. Deep integration with Microsoft 365 means your Outlook tasks, Planner assignments, and flagged emails all sync automatically. Available across iOS, Android, Windows, Mac, and web.

title: Things 3
description: Things 3 is an Apple Design Award-winning personal task manager that has set the gold standard for beautifully designed productivity software on Apple platforms. Crafted with exceptional attention to detail by Cultured Code, Things 3 combines a clean, distraction-free interface with a powerful set of features hidden elegantly beneath the surface. Quick capture lets you add tasks instantly from anywhere using keyboard shortcuts or the today widget. Areas of responsibility let you organize tasks by different roles in your life — work, personal, family, and health. Projects can be broken down into headings and checklists for granular control over complex work. Deadlines keep time-sensitive tasks visible without overwhelming your inbox. The app's Upcoming view presents a thoughtful weekly layout that balances tasks and calendar events in one glance. CloudKit sync ensures your tasks are always up to date across your iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Watch — all with zero configuration required.

title: Habitica: Gamify Your Tasks
description: Habitica is a revolutionary free habit and productivity app that treats your real life exactly like a role-playing video game, making self-improvement genuinely fun and deeply engaging. Build your own pixel-art character, choose a class, and earn experience points, gold, and rare equipment as you complete your real-world tasks, build daily routines, and develop positive habits. Every completed to-do makes your character stronger. Every missed habit deals damage to your health. Join a party with friends and tackle together powerful boss monsters that deal damage to the whole group when anyone misses their tasks — creating powerful social accountability that keeps everyone on track. Habitica features hundreds of quests, seasonal events, pets and mounts to collect, and a rich social layer including guilds, challenges, and a deeply engaged global community. The app covers everything from work tasks and fitness goals to language learning and mindfulness practices, all wrapped inside an addictive RPG experience.

title: TickTick: To Do List & Planner
description: TickTick is a comprehensive and elegantly designed to-do and task management app built for people who want a single powerful tool that handles everything — from simple daily reminders to complex long-term project planning. The app's built-in Pomodoro timer helps you stay focused during work sessions while detailed productivity statistics show you exactly how your time is being spent. Smart date parsing understands natural language, turning phrases like 'meeting tomorrow at 3pm' into properly scheduled calendar events without needing to tap through menus. TickTick's habit tracker lets you build and maintain positive routines with streak tracking and completion heatmaps. The calendar view integrates your tasks and events in one place, while the Eisenhower Matrix prioritization feature helps you focus on what's truly urgent and important. With real-time sync across all platforms — iOS, Android, Windows, Mac, and web — TickTick ensures your tasks are always exactly where you need them.

title: OmniFocus 3
description: OmniFocus 3 is the world's most powerful and sophisticated personal task manager, designed specifically for busy professionals and knowledge workers who need to manage large volumes of complex work across multiple areas of their life. Built exclusively for Apple platforms, OmniFocus is the trusted system of choice for practitioners of GTD — Getting Things Done — David Allen's renowned productivity methodology. Capture tasks and ideas from anywhere using the quick entry panel, email capture, Siri, or the share sheet in any app. Organize work using projects, sub-projects, sequential and parallel tasks, and tagging to create exactly the right structure for your work style. Custom perspectives let you build entirely unique views of your task database filtered by any combination of criteria imaginable. The Forecast perspective gives you a bird's-eye view of upcoming deadlines alongside your calendar. Powerful automation through Shortcuts, URL schemes, and TaskPaper format make OmniFocus the most extensible task manager available on any platform.

title: Google Tasks: Get Things Done
description: Google Tasks is a clean, simple, and deeply integrated task management app built by Google that helps you capture, organize, and complete your most important work from anywhere, at any time, across all of your devices. The app's intentional simplicity makes it frictionless to add tasks quickly — just type, set a due date, add subtasks, and you're done. What sets Google Tasks apart is its seamless and native integration with the rest of Google Workspace: flagged emails in Gmail become tasks instantly with one click, due dates appear automatically in Google Calendar, and tasks sync in real-time across every device where you're signed into your Google account. Subtasks allow you to break any item into smaller actionable steps, while the indent system lets you create clear hierarchical structures within your lists. The app supports multiple separate task lists for different areas of your life — work, personal, shopping, errands — all accessible through a clean sidebar interface inside Gmail and Calendar.

title: Structured – Daily Planner
description: Structured is a beautifully designed visual daily planner that reimagines how you organize your day by presenting all of your tasks and calendar events in a stunning, color-coded timeline layout. Rather than looking at a flat, featureless list of to-dos, Structured shows you exactly how your entire day is laid out hour by hour — making it immediately obvious where you have free time and where your schedule is getting crowded. Planning your day is as intuitive as drag-and-drop: simply move tasks around the timeline to reorganize your schedule in seconds. The app syncs with your existing Apple Calendar and Reminders, pulling all of your events and deadlines into one unified and gorgeous view. Time blocking has never felt more natural. Recurring tasks, custom colors, icons, and notes give each item its own identity. The Upcoming view shows your next 7 days at a glance so you can plan ahead with confidence. Structured is the favorite daily planning app of students, freelancers, and professionals who need to balance multiple commitments at once.

title: Asana: Work in One Place
description: Asana is the leading work management platform trusted by teams at over 130,000 organizations across 190 countries to plan, organize, track, and accomplish their most important goals and projects. Whether your team works in lists, boards, timelines, or calendars, Asana gives you the flexibility to manage work in the format that makes the most sense for how you operate. Create projects in seconds, assign tasks to team members with due dates and priorities, track progress with real-time status updates, and report on team productivity with beautiful portfolio dashboards. Asana's automation features let you build powerful no-code workflows that eliminate repetitive manual work — automatically assign tasks, send notifications, move projects between stages, and trigger actions in other apps. With over 200 integrations including Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Workspace, Zoom, Salesforce, and GitHub, Asana connects to every tool your team already uses. The mobile app ensures you can capture tasks, update statuses, and communicate with your team from anywhere.

title: GoodNotes 5
description: GoodNotes 5 is the most popular and highly acclaimed digital note-taking app for iPad, transforming your tablet into a truly smart piece of digital paper that you can write on, draw on, annotate, and organize exactly like a physical notebook — but with all the power and flexibility of modern software. Using Apple Pencil, your handwriting feels natural, smooth, and incredibly responsive, with a variety of pen types, thicknesses, and colors to choose from. GoodNotes uses industry-leading handwriting recognition technology that makes every word you write fully searchable — simply type a keyword in the search bar and GoodNotes will find every instance of that word across all of your notebooks instantly, even in your most hurried handwriting. Import and annotate PDFs, presentations, and images with your own handwritten notes and drawings. The app features a beautiful notebook cover system, customizable paper templates including blank, lined, dotted, and music staves, and a powerful folder and tag organization system to keep everything neatly arranged.

title: Evernote – Note Organizer
description: Evernote is one of the most established and comprehensive note-taking and personal knowledge management apps available, helping millions of people capture their ideas, organize their research, and retrieve information quickly when they need it most. With Evernote, you can create rich text notes that combine writing, images, audio recordings, file attachments, sketches, PDFs, and web clippings all in one place. The Web Clipper browser extension lets you save entire web pages, articles, or selected passages directly to your Evernote account with a single click — preserving the content exactly as it appeared, even if the original page is later removed. Powerful search capabilities let you find any note instantly by keyword, and Evernote can even search text within scanned documents and handwritten notes. Notebooks and tags give you a flexible two-dimensional organization system that scales to thousands of notes. Tasks with due dates, reminders, and calendar integration turn Evernote into a hybrid note-taking and productivity platform that follows you across all of your devices.

title: Trello: Manage Team Projects
description: Trello is the beloved visual project management tool that has fundamentally changed how individuals and teams organize their work by making the classic kanban board system accessible, beautiful, and deeply flexible for everyone. Each Trello board is a collection of lists filled with cards — and each card can contain checklists, due dates, attachments, labels, comments, members, and a complete activity history. Drag cards between lists to visualize progress through any workflow, from a simple to-do/doing/done board to a complex multi-stage content pipeline or software release process. Trello's Power-Ups system lets you extend the platform with additional views and integrations: switch from board view to a calendar, timeline, table, map, or dashboard — whichever format makes the most sense for your current project. With native integrations to Slack, Google Drive, Dropbox, GitHub, Jira, and hundreds of other apps via Zapier and Atlassian's own ecosystem, Trello fits seamlessly into virtually any team's existing workflow. Trusted by teams at companies of all sizes, from startups to Fortune 500 enterprises.
